system.name: BigCorp Trade Order Management System
system.domain: Financial services / securities trading (equities + FX derivatives)
system.purpose: Process equity trade orders, FX/derivative orders, settlement, notifications, risk assessment, and regulatory reporting

fields.name: notes
fields.constraints: nullable, free text, sometimes contains XML

transitions.condition: All rules pass AND price obtained AND manual checks pass
Any rule fails OR price unavailable OR price deviation > 10% OR client not found OR client inactive
Clearinghouse returns REJC or DISC status

entities.name: DerivativeOrder
entities.note: Separate model from TradeOrder; no common-lib dependency

fields.name: contractType
fields.constraints: required, values: FX_SPOT, FX_FORWARD, OPTION_CALL, OPTION_PUT

transitions.condition: Validation fails: missing fields, invalid type, or notional > 10,000,000

entities.name: RiskOrder
entities.note: Separate model from TradeOrder; no common-lib dependency

entities.name: RuleContext
entities.note: Runtime context object passed through rule chain; not persisted directly

fields.name: attributes
fields.constraints: generic key-value store for rule data

fields.name: warnings
fields.constraints: warnings that don't block the order

additionalTables.name: RULE_AUDIT_LOG
additionalTables.purpose: Every rule decision logged for regulatory compliance (REG-2011-003)

columns.name: RESULT
columns.constraints: NOT NULL, values: PASS, FAIL, SKIP

additionalTables.name: DAILY_VOLUME_TRACKER
additionalTables.purpose: Regulatory tracking table (REG-2005-001), unused in hot path

additionalTables.name: PRICING_CACHE
additionalTables.purpose: Cached pricing data for symbol lookups

additionalTables.name: SURVEILLANCE_AUDIT_LOG
additionalTables.purpose: Separate audit trail for surveillance rules (REG-2015)

additionalTables.name: POSITION_TRACKING
additionalTables.purpose: Net position per client per symbol for position limit checks (REG-2015-003)

rules.name: LayeringDetectionRule
rules.condition: COUNT(non-CANCELLED orders for same client+symbol) > threshold
rules.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRADE_ORDERS WHERE CLIENT_ID = ? AND SYMBOL = ? AND STATUS <> 'CANCELLED'

rules.name: PositionLimitRule
rules.sql: SELECT NET_POSITION FROM POSITION_TRACKING WHERE CLIENT_ID = ? AND SYMBOL = ?
rules.notes: Position limit should be configurable per client but hardcoded for now (JIRA-8200)

rules.name: MarketHaltRule
rules.notes: No exceptions, no overrides. SecurityManager errors default to not halted.

rules.name: ClientKillSwitchRule
rules.sql: SELECT KILL_SWITCH FROM CLIENTS WHERE CLIENT_ID = ?
rules.notes: Missing column or DB error defaults to 'N' (allow)

rules.name: KYCStatusRule
rules.sql: SELECT KYC_STATUS FROM CLIENTS WHERE CLIENT_ID = ?
rules.notes: Missing KYC record treated as PENDING (reject)

rules.name: DailyVolumeLimitRule
rules.notes: Per-order check despite the name; cumulative daily tracking never implemented (DBA said too slow)

rules.name: WashTradeDetectionRule
rules.condition: Opposite-side order from same client+symbol exists within window AND status != REJECTED
rules.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRADE_ORDERS WHERE CLIENT_ID = ? AND SYMBOL = ? AND SIDE = ? AND STATUS <> 'REJECTED' AND ORDER_DATE > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - 5 * INTERVAL '1' MINUTE

rules.name: MaxOrderValueRule
rules.notes: 10% buffer added for JIRA-1892 (Henderson Capital complaint, 2000)

rules.name: ClientTierRule
rules.condition: client.isActive() == false -> REJECT; else set priority attribute
rules.notes: PLATINUM/GOLD -> priority=HIGH, SILVER/BRONZE -> priority=NORMAL. Null client warns but passes.

rules.name: MarketHoursRule
rules.knownBug: Uses server local time, not Eastern Time. Disabled 6 months in 2001 when server clock was wrong.

rules.name: ShortSaleRule
rules.notes: Not in rules.xml (JIRA-4101); added manually after XML-loaded rules

rules.name: MultiCurrencyRule
rules.condition: Sets FX rate context attributes based on currency. Unknown currencies default to USD (not rejected).
rules.notes: FX rates copy-pasted from FxPricingHelper (JIRA-7101). Commission rate copy-pasted from CommissionCalculator default (JIRA-7103).

rules.name: VolumeDiscountRule
rules.condition: Always passes. Adjusts commission discount on execute().
rules.notes: Uses hardcoded 0.02 base commission instead of CommissionCalculator (JIRA-6001)

rules.name: SpecialClientsRule
rules.condition: Always passes. Applies per-client overrides on execute().
rules.notes: See specialClients array for full details. TODO: move to database (JIRA-7200). Class is too long (JIRA-7201).

rules.name: LoyaltyBonusRule
rules.condition: Always passes. Adds loyalty bonus for hardcoded client list.
rules.notes: Hardcoded client tenure check (JIRA-6002). C001 joined 1999, C002 joined 1999, C003 joined 2000.

ruleEngine.prioritySortOrder: DESCENDING (higher number runs first) by default

integrations.name: BIGCORP.SETTLEMENT.EVENTS
integrations.notes: Created for cancelled project; removing breaks settlement (unknown dependency)

integrations.name: EmailRelay
integrations.devMode: log to console when SMTP host is empty
integrations.notes: Unreliable during 5:00-5:30 PM EST market close

integrations.name: Oracle_PROD
integrations.notes: DDL managed by DBA via sql/schema-oracle.sql; bootstrap skips DDL for Oracle

commissionRateDiscrepancies.note: Flat rate for all tiers, different from CommissionCalculator tier-based rates
FX/derivatives commission, agreed with derivatives trading manager
Copy-pasted BASE_COMMISSION instead of using CommissionCalculator (JIRA-6001)
Copy-pasted COMMISSION_RATE instead of using CommissionCalculator (JIRA-7103)

loyaltyBonus.note: Hardcoded tenure check; C001 joined 1999, C002 joined 1999, C003 joined 2000 (JIRA-6002)

pricingSpreads.formula: bidPrice = lastPrice * (1.0 - spread); askPrice = lastPrice * (1.0 + spread)

fxRates.note: Hardcoded as of 2004-07-15; duplicated in 3 places (JIRA-7101)
fxRates.fxSpreadNote: bid = mid * (1 - spread/2), ask = mid * (1 + spread/2)

optionCallPut.note: Flat 5% of notional, placeholder for Black-Scholes

hardcodedPrices.note: Prices from 2000-2001, certainly stale. Unknown symbols return default. (JIRA-1102)

specialClients.name: Acme Trading LLC
specialClients.details: Can trade 10 minutes before market open (9:20 AM). Per email from VP of Sales, 2000-03-15.

specialClients.name: Henderson Capital
specialClients.details: No commission on first 1000 shares/day. Negotiated by Jim in sales, 1999.

specialClients.name: Smith & Associates
specialClients.details: Gets 1.0% commission instead of SILVER 1.5%. Per email from VP Sales 2009-03-10.

specialClients.name: MegaFund Inc
specialClients.details: Gets PLATINUM pricing spreads. Per verbal agreement with CEO. 'Do not change without checking with Larry.'

specialClients.name: Pinnacle Investments
specialClients.details: Gets 1.0% commission (50% off BRONZE 2.0%). JIRA-3401, implemented after 10 years.

specialClients.name: Falcon Trading Group
specialClients.details: Gets 0.5% commission. Per email from Sales Director, 2014-01-15.
specialClients.notes: No sample CLIENTS row seeded for C008

specialClients.name: Apex Capital
specialClients.notes: No sample CLIENTS row seeded for C009

specialClients.name: Sterling Investments
specialClients.details: Added same day as multi-currency feature.
specialClients.notes: No sample CLIENTS row seeded for C010

settlement.settlementDateRule: T+3 calendar days (does NOT skip weekends/holidays, JIRA-2890)
settlement.batchSchedule: 6 PM EST via cron (production); Timer-based in dev/demo

regulatoryReporting.dataScope: All FILLED and SETTLED orders, ordered by ORDER_DATE ASC

htmlEmail.footerText: This is an automated message from BigCorp Trading Systems. Do not reply to this email. For questions, contact the trading desk.

knownBugs.title: Priority Comparator Reversed
knownBugs.description: RuleEngine sorts rules in DESCENDING order by priority number (higher number runs first). System property bigcorp.rules.priority.fixed can fix this but defaults to false.

knownBugs.title: Inactive Rule Execute Bug
knownBugs.description: Rules loaded from XML with active=false still get execute() called if they were already registered from a previous run. The XML active attribute is not applied to the Rule object.

knownBugs.title: MarketHoursRule Uses Server Local Time
knownBugs.description: MarketHoursRule uses server local time instead of Eastern Time. Caused 6-month outage in 2001 when server clock was wrong.

knownBugs.title: T+3 Settlement Does Not Skip Weekends
knownBugs.description: calculateSettlementDate() adds 3 calendar days without skipping weekends or holidays. Clearinghouse recalculates on their end.

knownBugs.title: Non-Thread-Safe Singleton
knownBugs.description: RuleEngine.getInstance() is not thread-safe. Comment: 'It's fine, the app server is single-threaded.' (It isn't.)

knownBugs.title: Redundant Order Saves
knownBugs.description: Order is saved via both saveOrder() AND updateOrderStatus(). The second path exists because settlement batch reads from this update path.

knownBugs.title: Price Deviation Double-Check
knownBugs.description: Price deviation is checked both in rule engine AND manually in OrderMessageListener. Manual check kept because 'it caught a bug once.'

knownBugs.title: Notification INSERT-Only
knownBugs.description: NotificationListener does INSERT-only to NOTIFICATIONS table. Retried notifications create duplicate rows.

knownBugs.title: Settlement Queue Phantom Dependency
knownBugs.description: BIGCORP.SETTLEMENT.EVENTS queue was created for a cancelled project but cannot be removed because 'removing it breaks something in settlement (we don't know what).'

knownBugs.title: Commission Rate Inconsistency
knownBugs.description: PricingServiceImpl uses flat 0.015 rate while order-engine uses tier-based rates via CommissionCalculator. Documented as 'by design' but possibly a bug.

knownBugs.title: Hardcoded Fallback Prices
knownBugs.description: PricingServiceImpl has hardcoded fallback prices from 2000-2001. Unknown symbols return default price (10.00/10.50/10.25) instead of failing.

knownBugs.title: FX Rates Duplicated in 3 Places
knownBugs.description: FX rates copy-pasted in MultiCurrencyRule, FxPricingHelper, DerivativeProcessor. All hardcoded as of 2004-07-15. AUD/USD only in FxPricingHelper.

knownBugs.title: Partial Batch Not Implemented
knownBugs.description: partialBatchMode flag exists in BatchProcessor but logic never completed. Partial batches can occur on midway failure with no rollback.

knownBugs.title: DailyVolumeTracker Table Unused in Hot Path
knownBugs.description: DAILY_VOLUME_TRACKER table was created for cumulative daily volume tracking but only used for batch reporting, not real-time.

knownBugs.title: Reconciliation Reason Code Not Stored
knownBugs.description: DAT reconciliation files include reason codes but SettlementRecord has no reasonCode field.

knownBugs.title: VolumeDiscountRule Uses Hardcoded Commission
knownBugs.description: VolumeDiscountRule uses hardcoded 0.02 base commission instead of CommissionCalculator.

knownBugs.title: MultiCurrencyRule Uses Hardcoded Commission
knownBugs.description: MultiCurrencyRule uses hardcoded 0.02 commission instead of CommissionCalculator.

knownBugs.title: LoyaltyBonus Hardcoded Client List
knownBugs.description: LoyaltyBonusRule hardcodes tenure check for C001/C002/C003 rather than reading from database.

knownBugs.title: ShortSaleRule Not in XML Config
knownBugs.description: ShortSaleRule is added manually after config-loaded rules, not in rules.xml.

knownBugs.title: Weekend Orders Not Actually Queued
knownBugs.description: MarketHoursRule sets queued=true attribute but no downstream code actually defers execution.
